lookalikes.prompt: Full-body shot of an East Asian man in his late 30s, walking briskly across a downtown crosswalk at golden hour, wearing casual urban clothing. He has a square jawline, a short, slightly upturned nose, and wide-set, round brown eyes with slightly hooded lids. His dark brown, wavy hair is styled in a messy quiff, and he has a full, dark beard and mustache with subtle grey streaks. His lips are thin with a less defined cupid's bow. His face is slightly longer with less prominent cheekbones than the original. He has a confident, neutral expression, looking slightly to the left. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
